title: anogramma schizophylla
intro: Anogramma schizophylla, also known as the hair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family of Osmundaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Anogramma schizophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
